rationale: verification_command: cd cli && go test ./cmd -run "TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndAgentLinks|TestInstallProject_InTreeMode|TestInstallProject_ConventionMode|TestInstallGlobal_WritesToGlobalTreeAndAgentLinks" -count=1

Both ACs are already satisfied by existing code in cli/cmd/install.go and cli/cmd/install_global_test.go:

AC1 (ddx install <name> --global --silent → ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/ + ~/.claude/skills + ~/.agents/skills):
  Implemented in resolveInstallDirs(global=true) at install.go:186-193.
  Verified by TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndAgentLinks (passes).

AC2 (ddx install <name> no-global in-tree → <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/ + project skill links):
  Implemented in resolveInstallDirs(global=false) at install.go:195-198.
  Verified by TestInstallProject_InTreeMode (passes).

Full test suite: PASS in 498s. Working tree clean at base-rev 8c01b1bec.
